title: lathyrus oleraceus
intro: Lathyrus oleraceus, also known as grass pea, is a leguminous annual plant that belongs to the Fabaceae family. The medicinal properties of Lathyrus oleraceus have been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant is rich in nutrients and offers several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Lathyrus oleraceus can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and its seeds have been used as a nutritious food source in some parts of the world.
